headline: Evaluating WEC Energy Group (WEC) Valuation After Recent Multi‑Year Return Performance
summary: How WEC Energy Group (WEC) Has Been Performing Recently With no single headline event driving attention today, WEC Energy Group (WEC) still offers a data point rich snapshot for investors, from recent share returns to the scale of its regulated utility operations. Over the past month, the stock has returned about 4%, with a past 3 months return near 10%, while the 1 year total return sits just under 10%. Short term moves have been softer, with a 1 day decline of about 0.3% and a 7 day decline...
